epics.title: Epic: Platform Foundations
epics.body:
Outcome: create the technical foundation for a production-grade MVP.

Scope:
- monorepo or workspace structure
- CI and test automation
- environment configuration
- auth/session primitives
- DB migrations and seed data
- typed API contracts
- analytics and observability scaffolding

Exit criteria:
- local dev setup works for all engineers
- CI validates lint, test, and typecheck
- staging environment is deployable
- baseline auth and healthcheck paths are live

epics.title: Epic: Identity, Onboarding, and Campus Membership
epics.body:
Outcome: a student can sign up, verify school affiliation, select a campus, and create a profile.

Scope:
- email signup and login
- school email verification
- profile creation and editing
- campus scoping rules
- onboarding flow

epics.title: Epic: Activity Logging and Reward Engine
epics.body:
Outcome: a student can log real-world activity and receive deterministic XP and stat rewards.

Scope:
- activity type catalog
- activity submission flows
- reward rules engine
- idempotent reward events
- anti-abuse controls

epics.title: Epic: Progression, Streaks, and Quests
epics.body:
Outcome: a student can see daily progress, active streaks, available quests, and earned achievements.

Scope:
- progression dashboard
- streak engine
- daily and weekly quests
- quest progress tracking
- completion and claim flows

epics.title: Epic: Social Feed and Validation
epics.body:
Outcome: students can share achievements to a campus feed and interact through reactions and validations.

Scope:
- campus feed retrieval
- post creation from activities or quests
- reactions
- validations
- privacy and sharing controls

epics.title: Epic: Leaderboards, Competition, and Retention
epics.body:
Outcome: students can compare progress and receive lightweight motivation from competition.

Scope:
- campus leaderboards
- time-window ranking
- streak risk reminders
- in-app notifications for wins and interactions

epics.title: Epic: Admin, Moderation, and Operations
epics.body:
Outcome: internal operators can manage quests, reward rules, abuse handling, and pilot operations.

Scope:
- admin login and access control
- moderation queue
- report review
- quest template management
- reward rule management
- audit trails

epics.title: Epic: Beta Readiness and Pilot Launch
epics.body:
Outcome: the system is stable enough for a controlled campus pilot.

Scope:
- performance hardening
- analytics dashboards
- smoke tests
- support flows
- release checklists

stories.title: Set up repository layout for mobile, admin, API, and shared packages
stories.body:
Create the repo layout and ownership boundaries needed for 5-8 senior engineers to work concurrently.

Acceptance criteria:
- apps/mobile exists
- apps/admin exists
- services/api exists
- packages/contracts exists
- packages/analytics exists
- ownership boundaries are documented

stories.title: Create CI pipeline for lint, typecheck, unit test, and build
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- CI runs on pull requests
- lint, typecheck, unit tests, and builds are enforced
- failures block merge

stories.title: Define API contract package and schema conventions
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- shared schema package exists
- DTO naming conventions are documented
- client generation path is defined

stories.title: Create baseline database migration for users, campuses, and sessions
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- baseline migration created
- local DB bootstraps cleanly
- seed data path exists

stories.title: Add auth scaffold and health endpoints
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- health endpoint returns OK
- auth module scaffold exists
- session lifecycle is stubbed for feature work

stories.title: Build signup and login screens
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- signup screen exists
- login screen exists
- validation states and loading states are handled

stories.title: Implement signup, login, logout, and session APIs
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- signup API exists
- login API exists
- logout API exists
- sessions persist correctly

stories.title: Implement school email verification and campus lookup
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- school email verification flow works
- campus lookup resolves from school email domain
- unverified users are handled explicitly

stories.title: Build profile creation and campus selection UI
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- profile form exists
- campus selection exists
- profile persists after submit

stories.title: Implement activity type catalog and activity create endpoint
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- activity catalog is available via API
- activity create endpoint exists
- request validation is enforced

stories.title: Implement reward engine v1 with idempotent reward events
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- reward event is emitted once per idempotency key
- XP and stat deltas are server-authoritative
- duplicate submissions do not double-grant rewards

stories.title: Build dashboard shell with level, XP, stats, and recent activity
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- dashboard screen exists
- level and total XP are visible
- recent activity surface exists

stories.title: Add analytics events for signup and activity logging
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- signup_completed event is emitted
- activity_logged event is emitted
- event contracts are documented

stories.title: Implement streak state model and evaluation rules
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- streak state persists
- qualifying events update streaks
- streak logic is server-authoritative

stories.title: Implement quest templates, assignment, and progress tracking
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- daily and weekly quest templates exist
- user quests are assigned
- progress updates automatically from activity events

stories.title: Build progression UI for streaks and quests
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- streak card exists
- quest list exists
- quest claim flow exists

stories.title: Build internal quest template CRUD UI
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- admin can create quest templates
- admin can edit quest templates
- admin access is gated

stories.title: Implement feed read and create endpoints
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- campus feed endpoint exists
- post creation endpoint exists
- campus scope is enforced

stories.title: Implement reactions, validations, and report submission
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- reactions are persisted
- validations are persisted
- reports enter a moderation queue

stories.title: Build campus feed UI and share flow
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- feed screen exists
- users can share eligible achievements
- privacy controls are respected

stories.title: Implement leaderboard ranking queries and anti-abuse filters
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- daily, weekly, and all-time rankings exist
- suspicious activity is filtered or discounted
- ranking API is documented

stories.title: Build moderation queue and post removal workflow
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- reports are visible in admin
- operator can remove posts
- audit log is recorded

stories.title: Harden idempotency and retry-safe critical writes
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- retry-safe write paths are covered
- reward duplication protections are verified
- failure scenarios are documented

stories.title: Build activation and retention dashboards
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- activation dashboard exists
- retention dashboard exists
- event quality is validated

stories.title: Implement in-app notification center
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- notification center exists
- quest, streak, reaction, and validation events are represented

stories.title: Finish reward rule management and support tooling
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- reward rules can be updated by admin
- user lookup exists
- activity inspection exists

stories.title: Complete smoke suite and pilot rollout checklist
stories.body:
Acceptance criteria:
- smoke suite covers onboarding, activity logging, quests, and feed
- pilot checklist exists
- incident process exists
